reviewer: direct-review (subagent spawn failed due to bun-eval parsing error)
summary: Composio integration surface is fully implemented with tool discovery from MCP endpoint, well-known tool fallback, company-scoped configuration persistence, and downstream availability in OpenClaw config fields and AgentDetail. Tests cover config CRUD, tool selection, and integration page rendering.

strengths: MCP-based tool discovery with graceful fallback to well-known tools catalog
useComposioConfig hook handles full CRUD lifecycle with proper cache invalidation
ComposioToolDiscovery component reused in both Integrations page and OpenClaw config
Consumer key validation shown clearly when not provided

concerns.description: Integrations.tsx has a lint warning about rowMap construction affecting useCallback dependencies (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps). This is a performance concern but not a correctness issue.

issues.description: Lint warning: rowMap object construction makes useCallback dependencies change on every render in Integrations.tsx. Should be wrapped in useMemo().
